calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioner: Ming Bin Gin, present in pro per and with Guardian ad litem/Step Mother: Kanneeka Gin, and with Thai Interpreter: Ratana Kamprasert.
Interpreter and Guardian ad litem were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Steven Gin.
Decree signed in open court.
